description: STATION_1 can only be used by one worker at a time
STATION_2 can only be used by one worker at a time
STATION_3 can only be used by one worker at a time
STATION_4 can only be used by one worker at a time
RAW_MATERIAL starts at 4 units (Counter, initial=4), consumed by jobs and replenished by MATERIAL_HANDLER
Each job consumes 1 RAW_MATERIAL and requires 1 tool from TOOL_SUPPLY
With 8 total jobs and only 4 initial materials, workers must request replenishment from MATERIAL_HANDLER
INSPECTOR checks each job; failed jobs must be reworked
PACKAGER collects all 8 finished goods (2 per worker) before terminating
Workers with alternative routing nondeterministically choose station (Job 1 can use either of two stations)
INSPECTOR passes or fails each job inspection
Use station + tool + material -> complete job -> inspection -> pass (package) or fail (rework)
MATERIAL_HANDLER replenishes RAW_MATERIAL counter when workers request it
Overlapping station alternatives form a ring: WORKER_A uses STATION_1/STATION_2, WORKER_B uses STATION_2/STATION_3, WORKER_C uses STATION_3/STATION_4, WORKER_D uses STATION_4/STATION_1
All four workers compete for 3 shared tools from TOOL_SUPPLY and 4 initial RAW_MATERIAL units
Ring of station contention: four workers with overlapping station alternatives could create circular wait if alternative routing is not used
Resource exhaustion: RAW_MATERIAL depleted (counter=0) while MATERIAL_HANDLER has not been notified, stalling all workers needing materials
Combined tool + station contention: workers hold tools while waiting for stations, stalling other workers who need those tools on available stations
